name: instagram-cancel-follow-requests
description: Chrome extension to cancel pending Instagram follow requests sequentially.

scripts.package:cws: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./manifest.json').version") && mkdir -p release && rm -f "release/unfollow-manager-${VERSION}-chrome-web-store.zip" && zip -r "release/unfollow-manager-${VERSION}-chrome-web-store.zip" manifest.json background.js content.js popup.html popup.js
